etymology.description: The word 老火鍋(lǎo huǒ guō, "old-style hot pot") combines the concepts of 老(老) (lǎo, "old"), 火(火) (huǒ, "fire; hot"), and 鍋(鍋) (guō, "pot"). Together, it refers to a type of hot pot that is traditional or follows an old method of preparation.
etymology.interpretation: 老(老) (lǎo, "old") suggests something ancient or traditional, indicating a method or style passed down through generations. 火(火) (huǒ, "fire; hot") emphasizes cooking with direct heat, apt for the communal boiling method of a hot pot. 鍋(鍋) (guō, "pot") explicitly refers to the cooking vessel used. Combined, it conveys the image of a time-honored dining experience using hot pots, popular for gatherings across time.

examples.chinese: 我们今晚去吃老火锅(我們今晚去吃老火鍋)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen jīnwǎn qù chī lǎo huǒ guō.
examples.english: We are going to eat old-style hot pot tonight.

examples.chinese: 在冬天，吃一顿热腾腾的老火锅(在冬天，吃一頓熱騰騰的老火鍋)感觉很棒(感覺很棒)。
examples.pinyin: Zài dōngtiān, chī yī dùn rè téng téng de lǎo huǒ guō gǎnjué hěn bàng.
examples.english: In winter, eating a steaming old-style hot pot feels great.

examples.chinese: 许多人喜欢老火锅的独特味道(許多人喜歡老火鍋的獨特味道)。
examples.pinyin: Xǔduō rén xǐhuān lǎo huǒ guō de dútè wèidào.
examples.english: Many people enjoy the unique taste of old-style hot pot.
